creator: ztennix@gmail.com
text: Recently I was trying to install nixos-24.05 bhyve vm, the official iso crashed during boot. But 23.11 can be installed without any issues. By searching for the glibc package in different nixos, the nixos-24.05 uses glibc 2.39-52 while nixos-23.11 uses glibc 2.38-77. I think this might be same issue.
